subcodes.first_line: In this day all things are engaged in the remembrance and praise of God, and with the most exalted call do proclaim this sublime Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع اشیا بذکر و ثنای حق مشغول و باعلی الندآء باین کلمه علیا ناطقند
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
